Services

Three ways to work together, depending on your emergency.

01
Daily rate

Crisis Intervention

For leaders whose project is failing, team is dysfunctional, or critical delivery is at risk. I step in immediately, take full control, and reboot the organisation until it functions.

Typically <3 months · 24/7 engagement
02
Monthly retainer

Interim Management

Leadership gap during transitions, restructuring, or while finding a permanent hire. I manage your team, maintain performance, and hand over cleanly when the time comes.

Scope-dependent · Clean succession included
03
Outcome-based

Strategic Project Leadership

For executives who need a senior operator to drive a critical ramp-up, turnaround, or major delivery — without the overhead of a permanent hire or a consulting firm.

Project ramp-up & critical delivery phases
Stakeholder management & crisis communication
Team performance & accountability frameworks
FINMA-compliant governance & reporting
Experience

High-stakes mandates in
regulated financial services.

Every role below involved direct accountability for outcomes, people, and multi-million-franc budgets — in environments where failure wasn't an option.

01

AXA Switzerland

6 years

2019–2025 · VP, Head of Digital Advisory & Omni-Channel

Led 4 agile product teams end-to-end

Over 40 FTEs across Switzerland and Serbia, CHF 3.5M annual budget. Owner of FINMA-critical CRM sales platform (99.9% availability). Sponsored SAP S/4 HANA migration.

CRMSAP S/4 HANAFINMAAgileB2E
02

AXA Switzerland

6 months

2024 · a.i. Head of Sales Region (Leiter Aussendienst SRO)

Full sales region leadership ad interim

Accountable for 9 General Agents, 52 points of sale and 350+ advisors across all branches — total GWP over CHF 800M in P&C. Performance management, coaching, and FINMA compliance.

P&C InsuranceFINMAInterim Leadership350+ FTEs
03

Swiss Re

2 years

2017–2019 · Director, Global Head L&H Data Propositions

Global AI/data programme across 4 continents

5 direct reports in UK and India, dotted-line over 10+ FTEs across US, Asia, and India. Responsible for all AI use cases and implementations in Life & Health Reinsurance.

AI/DataReinsuranceL&HGlobal5 direct reports
04

AXA Switzerland

3 years

2014–2017 · VP, Head of Business Development Big Data

Deputy CDO — data & AI across the value chain

Identified and implemented data/AI use cases from underwriting to claims. Led Oracle → SAP-BW enterprise data warehouse migration for Marketing and Distribution.

Big DataAICDO OfficeSAP-BWOracle

ESSEC Business School — MSc in Management, top #2 France after HEC  ·  IPMA Level C Certified Project Manager  ·  French · German C2 · English C2

About

I treat your crisis like it's my own company on the line.

Proven in crisis

Specialized in high-octane interventions. I've stabilised failing teams and projects in FINMA-regulated environments where the cost of failure is existential.

Board-level fluency

VP and Director at AXA and Swiss Re. I speak the language of C-suite stakeholders and translate it for your teams — without losing anything in translation.

Tech-literate operator

SQL expert, Python advanced, former Head of Digital Advisory. I understand your engineering team's reality and won't be manipulated by technical excuses.

Clean succession

I come in, stabilise, and leave a team that runs without me. My mandates end with documented processes, re-engaged stakeholders, and a clear handoff plan.

Contact

Let's talk about your situation.

Whether you're facing a leadership gap, a project in freefall, or a team that's lost its way — let's start with a conversation. No obligation, no pitch deck.

Typical mandate profile

Duration 1 week diagnostic → 1–3 month engagement
Sector Financial services, insurance, regulated industries

Engagement Full-time, 24/7 availability during active crisis
